Master bedroom with a queen-size bed, while two smaller rooms are ideal for small children or babies. The bathroom includes both a bath and shower. Washer+dryer available! Style & practicality combined!

You are welcome to stay in our safe, clean and comfortable family villa on the outskirts of Amsterdam. This house is a perfect place to relax from all the recreation activities the area has to offer. It’s located on the edge of a residential area with a panoramic view on the Amsterdam-Rijn canal Feel free to grab any of our bikes to explore the surrounding recreational areas (Diemerbos, Gein, Gaasperplas), the historical town of Weesp or of course Amsterdam. Free parking on premises.

Located in the heart of De Pijp, one of Amsterdam’s most vibrant neighborhoods. This apartment offers a warm and modern atmosphere. The open layout and large windows create a spacious feel with plenty of natural light—perfect for both a city getaway and a work stay. A designer kitchen with an oven and dishwasher, a luxurious bathroom with a rain shower and bathtub, a south-facing balcony, high-speed WiFi, Apple TV, and a new comfortable bed (160x200).

Experience the allure of Amsterdam's Old-West district from our cozy apartment on Hugo de Grootkade. Nestled in a serene street, this retreat offers tranquility alongside convenience. Enjoy a spacious living area with a large TV and Netflix, speedy WiFi, and a fully equipped kitchen with a generous dining table. Supermarkets are a 2-minute walk away, while bars and cafes await within 5 minutes. Wake up to charming canal views, adding a touch of magic to your stay.

180m2 (excl rooftop) Lower Floor: {Living area} One large space (Lots of windows, corner house (panorama view of which 1 side to water), kitchen (luxury, built-in coffee machine) large table+sofa, TV/Music box. Toilet, 2x home offices (good WIFI) & washing machine+dryer. Upper Floor: 2x King size beds (2 large rooms, 1 with air conditioning), No noise pollution. Bathroom (luxury shower+bath incl. high quality music box ceiling). Toilet separate from bathroom. Roof terrace: Large, BBQ, sofa+heather+tables+chairs+all day sun.

Lovely bright apartment in the Center of Amsterdam. The canal facing balcony is set to the West and has a lovely and sunny afternoon. The living area is bright and cosy that will give you a home feeling. The apartment has been renovated with good taste and will feel very welcome.

Sunny spacious apartment (80m2) in the centre, but in a quiet street. The famous seven bridges canal is literally around the corner. Enjoy the fireplace in winter, sit out on the south facing terrace all day in summer. Comfortable designer couch. Airconditioning. Close to museums, shops and restaurants. Rijksmuseum is just a five minute walk and the Utrechtsestraat is fantastic for shopping. Last but not least: Luxury orthopedic bedding. You will sleep like a baby!

This beautiful 110 sq m, 2 bedroom apartment is located on the Keizersgracht near the popular '9 straatjes'. Highlights ; a modern kitchen, an amazing view from the living room and everything within walking distance. Great restaurants, bars and shops around the corner and Amsterdam's museum square (van Gogh, Rijksmuseum and Stedelijk museum) is 15 minutes away. Those 15 minutes will be spend walking along the historical canals. Are looking for food/bars/culture & shopping?

This newly renovated 100m2 apartment overlooks the Amsterdam forest. It features a living room, bedroom & bathroom en-suite. In addition, 3 sweet cats live with it during your stay. Want to go into town? No problem, the bus stops right in front of the door.

There is great history behind the hotel. The Vergulden Eenhoorn was established in 1702 as a city farm and used to be one of very few farmhouses the city of Amsterdam has. Together with the city of Amsterdam the farmhouse was fully renovated to modern standards, while maintaining the historic value and its features. The space is fully equipped with all necessities to make your stay as comfortable as possible!

Beautiful apartment in the hip and up and coming Indische buurt in Amsterdam east. The apartment is in a calm street in a bustling neighbourhood. 10 minutes by bike to the Amsterdam canals and 15 minutes to Amsterdam Centraal. Public transport (bus/tram) stops 1 minute walk from the house! I live there myself with great pleasure so I hope others can enjoy it too:)

Enjoy a spacious guestroom and the privacy of your own bathroom on the 4th floor of a lately renovated merchant's house from 1896. 5 min walking from the Canal belt, Jordan, and De Hallen, and 15 min walking to the Vondelpark and main museums. Quiet street, yet plenty of restaurants close by. Private roof terrace!

Charming Apartment with Large Terrace in the Dapperbuurt This cozy apartment in the lively Dapperbuurt is a peaceful oasis, close to the center of Amsterdam. Perfect for travelers who want to explore the city and then relax on the spacious, sunny terrace. A few minutes walking from the Dappermarkt, Eastern park, Tropen museum and the zoo Artis ✨

Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space. The entire apartment is modernly equipped , located in a 100 year old historical building in the middle of de Pijp. Close to public transport, main shopping street , restaurants. It is next to the Albert cruyp market. 15 minutes walking distance to the historical center. Tram stop and metro lines are nearby. It is on the ground floor, direct access to the street.

The appartement is in a vibrant part of Amsterdam with shops, cafe's and restaurants nearby. The supermarket is very close only a few hundred meters. Still we live in quiet street near a small square. The biggest park (Vondelpark)is a few minutes walk. Near public transport.

Charming two-level apartment full of light and authentic Amsterdam character, located in vibrant Czaar Peterbuurt. Enjoy a bright living area with large windows and a cozy window seat, a modern kitchen with stone countertop, and a stylish brick wall. Upstairs is a spacious bedroom with wooden beams and big windows. The bathroom has a walk-in shower. A perfect base to explore the city’s culture, cafés, and hotspots.

This is a spacious and cosy apartment in the centre of Amsterdam. Enjoy your morning coffee in the sunshine on the large balcony overlooking the canal, hang out on the big and comfortable couch after a day of sightseeing or walk to one of the many sights or restaurants which are within walking distance. The apartment is the perfect place to enjoy Amsterdam to the fullest. After making a reservation I will send you a link with my insider tips so that you won't end up at one of the tourist traps!

This spacious & luxurious house is located next to the iconic Vondelpark, making it the perfect place for families who want to be close to all city's highlights. With 150sqr meters, this house offers plenty of room: two spacious bedrooms, each with its own bathroom, a large kitchen and cozy fireplace But the real highlight of this house is its location. You'll be just a short walk away from some of Amsterdam's best restaurants, cafes & shops, as well as world-famous museums (e.g., Rijksmuseum)

This bright, renovated one-bedroom apartment is ideally located next to the trendy Jordaan district and just a short walk from Westerpark. It features a spacious, sun-filled living room, a modern, fully equipped kitchen and a stylish bathroom. Enjoy the vibrant cafés, boutique shops, and local markets in the Jordaan and the city centre nearby. Perfect for a romantic getaway or solo retreat. This apartment offers a cozy, stylish and convenient base for your stay in Amsterdam!

Nice Loft on the top floor in Amsterdam South - This loft has is own door and is great for short and medium stay in Amsterdam - The loft has everything, living room, kitchen, bathroom and even terrace. (license Z/25/2905527).

Characteristic dyke house in the most beautiful and oldest street in fancy Amsterdam-North called the 'Nieuwendammerdijk'. Our house is more than 100 years old and you can feel its history when you stay in it. Our house and its street have a village-feel, but you can also find the busy vibrant city very nearby (one stop in metro to central station Amsterdam). In short, our house and its surroundings do offer the best of both worlds: vibrant city and countryside (nature)!

High-end unique loft located on ground floor apartment of approx. 190 m2 boasting a garden and an electric roof, located on the beautiful Jacob van Lennepkade in Amsterdam Old West. The apartment has two bedrooms and two bathrooms. The apartment is located in the popular Amsterdam Oud West with amazing view of the Jacob van Lennepkanaal. Vondelpark is within walking distance and the immediate vicinity offers a diverse selection of restaurants, cafes, and boutique stores

Welcome to Our Charming Apartment in De Pijp! Nestled near the picturesque Amstel River, our apartment offers the perfect blend of comfort and convenience. Located in the vibrant De Pijp neighborhood, you'll be surrounded by lively cafes, trendy boutiques, and shops. If you prefer the calm, the street is very quiet. One bedroom apartment with separate living room, kitchen, hallway, balcony, bedroom in a quiet building.

This stylish apartment is perfect for a couple. Recently renovated with high-quality materials, it offers a comfortable and modern stay. The flat is located on a shopping street with a park. All areas of Ams are easily accessible by public transport, with a stop right outside the door. In summer, the entire apartment is filled with sunlight, and the spacious balcony enjoys sun all day. All other amenities, including supermarkets, cafés, restaurants, and shops, are within a five-minute walk.

No smoking Normal central heating Proud to present beautiful classic Houseboat center of Amsterdam near Central Station! Amazing views you will definitely appreciate the warm look of the place with all its wooden finishes. Central heating, shower, toilet, everything is modernized and works just like it would in an apartment. TV, Wi-Fi, Nespresso coffee, steamer, hairdryer, and a water cooker are provided No other cooking facilities. Walking distance Dam Square, Nemo Museum, Public library

Westerpark is one of the most fantastic areas of Amsterdam! The space is 7min. from the station with the bus, 2 min. on the bike to the gorgeous & 'happening' (for all ages!) Wester Park itself, a 15 min. stroll to the Jordaan & canals, centre 20min

Our flat is located in the neighborhood called Oud West, very charming and dynamic area, with lot of restaurants and bars, 200 meters from VondelPark. Ideal for a family, with a playground located in the same block. 2 min walk from tram station. The flat is about 100 m2, with 1 living room, 3 bedrooms (for 5 people), 1 bathroom, 1 private rooftop. Wifi, TV. Minimum 3 nights, family only Special price > 4 nights

In the popular Old-West area, close to the famous Vondelpark and Leidse square, is our beautiful and cozy studio situated. It's newly renovated, with a beautiful bathroom with rain shower, kitchenette with Nespresso machine and dishwasher, a comfortable double bed with luxurious linnen and your own private entrance. Perfect for a getaway to Amsterdam! We became superhosts with our other studio, with almost 200 5 star reviews. We used all our hosting experience for renovating this new space.

We are welcoming you to stay in our spacious and uniquely decorated home, filled with some beautiful handmade wooden furniture pieces and art. The apartment is very well located in the 'Old-West' part of Amsterdam in the beautiful Helmersbuurt. You will be steps away from Vondelpark, Museum Square and the canals where many popular Amsterdam sights can be found. Our apartment has a bright and spacious living room with open kitchen of 50m2 and a separate bed- and bathroom (with bath!)

This is a fully furnished, cosy room on the ground floor of an inner city apartment with private street access. Just minutes from Central Station, and Dam Square. Next to the lovely Jordaan area, (bars, cafes and boutiques; markets and canals). Not to mention theRed Light district on the other side. There's a microwave, a fridge, a wardrobe, and an en suite bathroom (shared with me) with bath, shower, washing machine (no dryer).

Light spacious two storey apartment in a small charming apartment complex with a beautiful garden. The apartment has two comfortable bedrooms with double beds. The area is quiet and safe. The connection to the centre is very easy and fast by tram.
Charming room with annex bathroom and pantry in a hip, lively street. The BnB is in walking distance to all major sights, nightlife and musea.

Welcome to our cozy, eclectic home—a perfect blend of comfort and style! Located in Amsterdam West, an ideal place for couples or small families. Our eco-friendly home features solar power for a sustainable stay. Only 9 min from Amsterdam Centruum, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Explore the beauty of the city then return to soak up lots of natural light and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere throughout our home.

Welcome to our modern flat near the Olympic Stadium and business centre de zuidas! The flat offers a modern kitchen, comfortable bedroom and sunny balcony in a quiet neighbourhood of Amsterdam Zuid. Only 15 minutes by bike from the city centre and easily accessible from Schiphol Airport. Enjoy close proximity to top attractions, shops and restaurants. Perfect for both business and leisure travellers. We look forward to welcoming you for an unforgettable stay!

Enjoy your own cosy and individually decorated private room at the Flying Pig Downtown Hostel. Our 18th century building has been transformed into one of the most notorious party spots in the Dutch capital. Complete with complimentary towels, toiletries, and your own ensuite bathroom, this is the perfect spot for young backpackers to base themselves.

This comfortable duplex suite offers 39 sqm of space. Ideal for up to two people, its double bed (160x200) and modern bathroom with shower make this stay a perfect way to experience Amsterdam. There’s also a kitchen and a dining table, so you’ll have everything you need for maximum comfort and minimal stress.
Enjoy this peaceful part of Amsterdam while still being within walking distance of the vibrant Jordaan.

A wonderful luxury apartment with a central location, 2 minutes walk to the metro that takes you with a direct connection to the city center in 6 minutes. The apartment is a stone's throw away from the Amstel canal where there are many nice hotspots. The double downstairs house is full of comforts with a modern/classic comfortable decor. Enjoy the peace and space in the house with the coziness of the Weesperzijde around the corner, where you can walk beautifully along the Amsterdam canals.
